title: 23.09.2024 İngilizce Yeterlik Sınavı (DÜİYES) Önemli Bilgilendirme
content:
Duyurular

Detay

Sevgili Öğrencilerimiz,

Tıklayınız

Tıklayınız

Dear Students,

The 2024-2025 Spring Semester English Proficiency Exam (DÜİYES) will be administered on Monday, September 23

rd

, and invigilated face-to-face on Dudullu Campus. The exam consists of two sessions, and students must attend both sessions.

The students are to be present in the class where they will take the exam at 10.30 so that the invigilators can check the students’ ID cards on time.

Students must have a valid ID with a photo (student ID card, passport, driver's license) during the exam. You have to present a valid ID to be admitted to the exam.

The students need to bring a blue pen, pencil and an eraser.

DÜİYES results will be announced on September 27

th

.
